name: aws_firehose_incoming_records
definition: Records successfully accepted by the delivery stream per CloudWatch period. Excludes throttled records. Use sum+rate for per-second ingestion rate. Primary producer throughput signal.
absence_means: No data ingested — stream is idle or producers are not writing
cardinality_footguns: Safe for group-by; bounded by delivery stream count

name: aws_firehose_throttled_records
definition: Records rejected at ingestion because the delivery stream exceeded its service throughput or records-per-second limit. CRITICAL: throttled records are NOT retried by Firehose — they are silently dropped. The producer must retry.
absence_means: No throttling — ingestion is within service limits (healthy)

name: aws_firehose_put_record_batch_bytes
definition: Total bytes submitted to the delivery stream via PutRecordBatch API calls per period. Includes both accepted and throttled records. Measures producer-side volume before Firehose filtering.
absence_means: No API calls — producers not writing

name: aws_firehose_put_record_batch_records
definition: Records submitted via PutRecordBatch API calls per period. A single call carries up to 500 records or 4 MiB. Includes both accepted and any subsequently throttled records.
absence_means: No API calls — producers not writing

name: aws_firehose_put_record_batch_requests
definition: Number of PutRecordBatch API calls per period. One call = 1 request regardless of record count. Use with put_record_batch_records to compute average batch size efficiency.
absence_means: No API calls — producers not writing

name: aws_firehose_put_record_batch_latency
definition: Per-call latency in milliseconds for PutRecordBatch API operations. Use average aggregation. Increases with record size, Firehose service pressure, or throttling. Producer-observed API response time.
absence_means: No API calls — producers not writing

name: aws_firehose_delivery_to_http_endpoint_data_freshness
definition: Age in seconds of the oldest record currently buffered in the delivery stream that has not yet been delivered to the HTTP endpoint. THE primary Firehose operational signal. Use max aggregation for worst-case. Rising value = delivery is blocked or retrying.
absence_means: Stream is idle (no records in flight) — confirm with incoming_records
cardinality_footguns: Safe; max aggregation is correct for SLO tracking

name: aws_firehose_delivery_to_http_endpoint_bytes
definition: Bytes delivered to and acknowledged by the HTTP endpoint destination per CloudWatch period. Use sum+rate for per-second delivery throughput. Should approach incoming bytes over longer windows accounting for buffer delay.
absence_means: HTTP endpoint delivery not configured or stream is idle

name: aws_firehose_delivery_to_http_endpoint_records
definition: Records delivered to and acknowledged by the HTTP endpoint destination per CloudWatch period. Over longer windows should approach incoming_records accounting for buffer interval delay.
absence_means: HTTP endpoint delivery not configured or stream is idle
cardinality_footguns: Safe; do not compare to incoming_records in short windows due to buffering

name: aws_firehose_delivery_to_http_endpoint_processed_bytes
definition: Total bytes sent to the HTTP endpoint per period including all delivery attempts and retries. Exceeds delivery_to_http_endpoint_bytes when the endpoint is rejecting or timing out requests. Use sum+rate.
cardinality_footguns: Safe; compare to delivery_bytes to measure retry overhead

name: aws_firehose_failed_validation_records
definition: Records rejected during schema validation when an MSK (Kafka) source is configured. Non-zero value indicates records from the Kafka source stream are failing the schema check at ingestion. Use sum+rate.
absence_means: MSK source not configured or all records passing validation (healthy)
cardinality_footguns: context.sourcepartitionid can be used to identify which Kafka partition is producing invalid records

name: aws_firehose_kms_key_access_denied
definition: Number of KMSAccessDeniedException errors during delivery. Any non-zero value means the delivery stream IAM role lacks permission to use the KMS key — all delivery is blocked immediately. Requires KMS-based SSE enabled.
absence_means: KMS encryption not enabled — metric absent (healthy)

name: aws_firehose_kms_key_disabled
definition: Number of KMSDisabledExceptions during delivery. The KMS key has been disabled — all delivery is blocked until re-enabled. Requires KMS-based SSE enabled.
absence_means: KMS encryption not enabled — metric absent

name: aws_firehose_kms_key_invalid_state
definition: Number of KMSInvalidStateExceptions during delivery. The KMS key is in an invalid state (e.g., pending deletion). All delivery blocked. Requires KMS-based SSE enabled.
absence_means: KMS encryption not enabled — metric absent

name: aws_firehose_kms_key_not_found
definition: Number of KMSNotFoundExceptions during delivery. The KMS key ARN no longer exists. All delivery blocked until stream configuration is updated. Requires KMS-based SSE enabled.
absence_means: KMS encryption not enabled — metric absent

name: IncomingBytes
definition: MISSING — not present in Tsuga. Bytes successfully ingested by the delivery stream. Absent because the Prometheus CloudWatch Exporter is not exporting this metric for the org's streams.

name: BytesPerSecondLimit
definition: MISSING — not present in Tsuga. Current throughput limit for the delivery stream in bytes/s. Absent from the Prometheus CloudWatch Exporter's metric set for the org's streams.

name: RecordsPerSecondLimit
definition: MISSING — not present in Tsuga. Current records/s limit for the delivery stream. Absent from the Prometheus CloudWatch Exporter's metric set.

name: DeliveryToS3.DataFreshness
definition: MISSING — org uses HTTP endpoint destination not S3. All DeliveryToS3.* metrics are absent. Use aws_firehose_delivery_to_http_endpoint_data_freshness instead.

name: DeliveryToS3.Success
definition: MISSING — org uses HTTP endpoint destination not S3.

name: DeliveryToS3.Bytes
definition: MISSING — org uses HTTP endpoint destination not S3.

name: DeliveryToS3.Records
definition: MISSING — org uses HTTP endpoint destination not S3.

name: ExecuteProcessing.Duration
definition: MISSING — Lambda transformation not enabled on the org's delivery streams.

name: ExecuteProcessing.Success
definition: MISSING — Lambda transformation not enabled on the org's delivery streams.

name: SucceedProcessing.Records
definition: MISSING — Lambda transformation not enabled.

name: FailedConversion.Records
definition: MISSING — format conversion not enabled on the org's delivery streams.

name: SucceedConversion.Records
definition: MISSING — format conversion not enabled.

name: BackupToS3.DataFreshness
definition: MISSING — S3 backup not enabled (Lambda transformation not active).

name: BackupToS3.Success
definition: MISSING — S3 backup not enabled.

name: PartitionCount
definition: MISSING — dynamic partitioning not enabled on the org's delivery streams.

name: KinesisMillisBehindLatest
definition: MISSING — Kinesis Data Streams is not the source for the org's delivery streams.

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Firehose does not expose a direct cost metric. Cost is driven by ingested data volume. Use aws_firehose_put_record_batch_bytes (sum+rate) as cost proxy — Firehose pricing is per-GB ingested. For detailed cost analysis use AWS Cost Explorer with service filter 'AmazonKinesisFirehose'.
